raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Valley Transportation Authority (VTA) has received a $46 million grant to extend to the Eastridge Transit Center in East San Jose.",
    "The funding will be used to build a 2.4 mile light rail extension connecting VTA’s second-busiest bus transit center to the Bay Area Rapid Transit (BART).",
    "The light rail to BART connector aims to provide easy bicycle, pedestrian, and park & ride options.",
    "The project is expected to cut down on traffic and air pollution in some of San Jose’s lowest-income and most transit-dependent neighborhoods.",
    "The light rail extension will help the State of California reach its climate goals."
  ]
}
```
